Test Scenario: Verify APK launches and shows splash screen
Test Steps: 1. Launch target APK. 2. Verify header branding.
Expected Result: Splash screen renders and display contains 'ParcelVault' branding.

Test Scenario: Verify auto-transition from splash to onboarding
Test Steps: 1. Launch app. 2. Wait 3 seconds without interacting.
Expected Result: App switches from splash view to onboarding slider screen automatically.

Test Steps: 1. Open first slide of onboarding. 2. Verify texts.
Expected Result: Header texts

Test Scenario: Verify Next button transitions to onboarding slide 2
Test Steps: 1. Locate and click 'Next' button.
Expected Result: Onboarding screen transitions to second slide showing locker details.

Test Scenario: Verify Next button transitions to onboarding slide 3
Test Steps: 1. From slide 2 click 'Next' button.
Expected Result: Onboarding screen transitions to third slide displaying pickup details.

Test Scenario: Verify Get Started navigates to Welcome selection
Test Steps: 1. Click 'Get Started' button on final slide.
Expected Result: App redirects to selection screen (Student Login

Test Steps: 1. Observe Welcome page.
Expected Result: Shows buttons: 'Student Login'

Test Steps: 1. On Welcome screen click hardware Back key.
Expected Result: Android system processes back navigation without causing application crash.

Test Steps: 1. Click 'Student Login' button. 2. Inspect inputs.
Expected Result: Renders inputs for Email

Test Steps: 1. Click 'Student Login'. 2. Click 'Sign In' immediately.
Expected Result: Displays alert: 'Please fill all fields'.

Test Steps: 1. Enter unregistered email. 2. Enter invalid password. 3. Click 'Sign In'.
Expected Result: Displays failure warning: 'Invalid email or password'.

Test Scenario: Verify Student Login with valid credentials
Test Steps: 1. Input correct student email. 2. Input correct password. 3. Sign In.
Expected Result: Authenticates user and redirects to Student Dashboard.

Test Steps: 1. View password input element type.
Expected Result: Verify type attribute is set to 'password'.

Test Steps: 1. Type text in password. 2. Tap Eye icon.
Expected Result: Input characters display in plain text; field type toggles to 'text'.

Test Steps: 1. Click 'Forgot password?' link.
Expected Result: Redirects student to Forgot Password entry screen.

Test Steps: 1. Tap 'Create Student Account'. 2. Verify inputs.
Expected Result: Shows fields: Name

Test Steps: 1. Fill fields. 2. Input mismatching passwords. 3. Click submit.
Expected Result: Registration rejects with error message: 'Passwords do not match'.

Test Steps: 1. Try password with letters only. 2. Verify password checks.
Expected Result: Rejects showing message: 'Password must contain both letters and numbers'.

Test Steps: 1. Try registering using a taken email address. 2. Submit.
Expected Result: Rejects registration with database conflict error message.

Test Scenario: Verify registration with duplicate student ID
Test Steps: 1. Try registering using a taken Student ID. 2. Submit.
Expected Result: Rejects registration with database conflict error message.

Test Steps: 1. Fill valid unique info. 2. Click register button.
Expected Result: App displays success toast: 'Account created' and switches to login.

Test Steps: 1. Click 'Admin Access' link. 2. Verify form.
Expected Result: Displays inputs: Admin Email

Test Steps: 1. Enter admin credentials. 2. Submit form.
Expected Result: Redirects admin user to the Admin Dashboard screen.

Test Scenario: Verify Admin Login fails with student credentials
Test Steps: 1. Input student login in admin form. 2. Submit.
Expected Result: Fails with error message: 'Invalid admin credentials'.

Test Scenario: Verify dashboard headers and name greeting
Test Steps: 1. Authenticate student. 2. Verify greeting.
Expected Result: Name greeting matches logged-in user name.

Test Steps: 1. Inspect dashboard parcel count cards.
Expected Result: Cards display correct numbers for total

Test Steps: 1. Verify notification bell badge.
Expected Result: Badge matches the unread notification count in database.

Test Steps: 1. Tap My Parcels link.
Expected Result: Navigates to full parcels list screen.

Test Steps: 1. Tap a parcel item from list.
Expected Result: Shows modal detailing tracking

Test Scenario: Verify OTP code display for ready parcels
Test Steps: 1. Open a ready parcel from list.
Expected Result: Locker label and 6-digit OTP code must display clearly.

Test Steps: 1. Open collect modal. 2. Input valid OTP. 3. Tap collect.
Expected Result: Shows success; status badges update to 'collected'.

Test Steps: 1. Tap bell icon.
Expected Result: Renders notification panel with messages list.

Test Steps: 1. Open unread notification. 2. Mark read.
Expected Result: Unread status indicator clears; unread count badge updates.

Test Steps: 1. Swipe/tap delete button on notification item.
Expected Result: Item is removed; alert history updates.

Test Steps: 1. Open profile menu. 2. Tap Logout.
Expected Result: Token is cleared; app redirects to Welcome screen.

Test Steps: 1. Authenticate admin. 2. Verify dashboard cards.
Expected Result: Shows total numbers

Test Steps: 1. View occupancy rate card. 2. Compare database.
Expected Result: Calculated rate matches database lockers usage state.

Test Steps: 1. Tap 'Add Parcel'. 2. Submit empty fields.
Expected Result: Fields studentId

Test Steps: 1. Fill parcel logging fields. 2. Tap save.
Expected Result: New parcel created in database as 'pending' status.

Test Steps: 1. Open assign locker modal on a pending parcel. 2. Verify dropdown.
Expected Result: Shows list containing only unoccupied

Test Steps: 1. Select locker from dropdown. 2. Click assign.
Expected Result: Status shifts to 'ready'; OTP is generated; locker occupied status is set.

Test Scenario: Verify locker occupancy details show in grid
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to lockers tab. 2. Observe locker status.
Expected Result: Locker shows red/occupied indicator.

Test Steps: 1. Locate ready parcel. 2. Click release. 3. Confirm.
Expected Result: Parcel status set to 'expired'; locker is marked available.

Test Scenario: Verify student list search and filters
Test Steps: 1. Type character keyword in search. 2. Inspect list.
Expected Result: Displays only students whose names/IDs match search queries.

Test Steps: 1. Select student in list. 2. Click delete. 3. Confirm modal.
Expected Result: Student account and all notifications are purged.

Test Steps: 1. Tap logout icon on navbar.
Expected Result: Admin session is closed and redirects to Welcome screen.
